title: viola keiskei
intro: Viola keiskei, also known as the Japanese yellow violet or Keiske's violet, is a species of flowering plant in the violet family. Native to Japan, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving sore throats, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Viola keiskei is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments, including colds, flu, and digestive issues.
